title: Prestige Pressure Cooker 6l - Classic High Dome Pressure Cooker with Heat Resistant Locking Safety Handle, Grey
features: ✅ FASTER MEALS - It's easy, just throw everything in your high pressure cooker to create delicious meals 70% quicker than normal cooking. It's a no brainer, you will save time and energy.
✅ HEALTHIER MEALS - our 6L pressure cooker will also help you to keep all the good nutrients in your food during the cooking process, meaning you'll end up with a tasty and healthy meal.
✅ FOR FAMILY MEALS - Our big pressure cooker is just right for families. It can help you cook 8-10 healthy meal servings in one pan and will be easy to store in your kitchen.
✅ PRACTICAL ACCESSORIES - Comes with a pressure cooker accessories set containing a separator, divider, wire trivet and recipe book to unleash your creativity and cook anything you dream of.
✅ ULTRA SAFE LOCK - This 6ltr pressure cooker comes with multi-functional locking safety handle and heat resistant handles to keep you safe. It also displays a visual pressure indicator.
PLEASE NOTE - THIS PRESSURE COOKER IS NOT SUITABLE FOR INDUCTION HOBS
description: From the manufacturer The Advantages of Pressure Cooking Every home needs a great pressure cooker! And no-one knows more about them than Prestige! Ours will save you time, energy and preserve the healthy nutrients in your food. Who needs ready meals, when our stylish design gives you fast food in minutes! Like all families, our products come in all shapes and sizes. Have a look at our website to see the full Prestige range. Prestige Aluminium Pressure Cookers There’s nothing like great food and home cooking to bring everyone together. Whether it’s a family lunch or just a family favourite, you probably don’t need a recipe, just a helping hand and some tasty ingredients. Practical and durable, they’re an essential ingredient for cooking real food, in real homes. Speed - Generally 70% faster than normal cooking Nutritional Value - Minimum loss of nutrients. Convenience - Cook a complete meal with one pan. Efficient - 1 heating area and reduced time. Versatile - Cook all your favourites. Not sure how to use a Pressure Cooker ? Follow these 4 easy steps A few recipe ideas to start with your Pressure Cooker Keralan Chicken Curry - Ready in 20 Minutes ! Succulent chicken thighs in a coconut sauce flavoured with fresh ginger and mellow spices, this delicious curry is so simple and quick to make. Taking just 15 minutes in the pressure cooker it's faster than ordering a take-away! Tender Pork Ribs - Ready in 20 Minutes ! The pressure cooker is a brilliant way to cook fall-apart tender ribs in a fraction of the normal time. Just pop them under the grill or on the BBQ for a few minutes to brown them after cooking. Boston Baked Beans - Ready in 20 Minutes ! Originating from Boston, combining inexpensive dried haricot beans with smoky bacon and sweet black treacle for a rich flavour. Great as a meal in itself or as a side at a barbecue.
